title: Buggy's Business and the Climb to Zou
description: On pages 10–13, this part focuses on buggy's business and the climb to zou within the Zou and the Ripples of Dressrosa storyline.
scene: The story cuts between Zou, the Revolutionary Army, Blackbeard's crew, Buggy's organization, and the Straw Hats climbing the giant elephant.

dialogue.speaker: Buggy
dialogue.text: Chairman Buggy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Nyga Hahah! What's up!

dialogue.speaker: Buggy's subordinate
dialogue.text: The phones won't stop ringing! We've got dispatch requests coming out the wa zoo!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All because Doflamingo's stopped ship- went of his weapons!

dialogue.speaker: Buggy
dialogue.text: People are now desperately hiring pirate mercenaries! We've completely cornered the war market!

dialogue.speaker: Buggy
dialogue.text: GyaAAAA haha Hahahaha! I see, I see. Listen up boys! After you've had your fill,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Go cause some havoc in Battle! Pilage me a fortune!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No matter what pirate evil you bas- Tards get mixed up in, as long as you work for me,

dialogue.speaker: Buggy
dialogue.text: Star clown buggy, the Warlord, Everything's Legal! Go Nuts! GyaHaha!

dialogue.speaker: Buggy
dialogue.text: BUGGY!

dialogue.speaker: Buggy
dialogue.text: Ah, Chairman buggy! We've received word from S-Class Mercury Hajrudin.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: And?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Looks like he's resigning.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well, whatever. We can afford to lose one. We still have 4 other giants.

dialogue.speaker: Buggy
dialogue.text: Buggy!

dialogue.speaker: Buggy's subordinate
dialogue.text: All 5 of them are quitting.

dialogue.speaker: Buggy
dialogue.text: Buggy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: ;What I

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Those boys are our golden geese! His timing couldn't be worse for crying out loud...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: What's their reason!!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: You really don't want to know...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: spill it!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: An island that grew on the back of a...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Giant elephant, one tall enough to reach even the clouds.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: My arms are tired!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Just how tall is this thing!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't be like that. This little guy's giving it his best.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: So... cute...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The strange thing that has Luffy and the others on its back...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We still have zero visibility with the peak.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I wonder how Sanji and the others got up this thing.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: is currently climbing this giant elephant's left hind leg.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Are you sure they're even up there?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: come to think of it, what businessdo you guys have at Zou in the first place?

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: Kin'Emon? Kanjuro?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We are indebted to you all... and we will most certainly explain ourselves, in Duetime, so...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Please, allow us one last ounces- sign.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Indeed. We left the Wano Kingdom for 200. This is our original destination.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: We must confirm MOMONO- Suke's safety,

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: As well as whether or not our last comrade, the Ninja Raizo, with whom we were separated at sea, has safely landed here.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: What!?

dialogue.speaker: Raizo
dialogue.text: Ninja!? Is he really a Ninja!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Q What in the ...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Indeed he is!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Luffy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Some- thing's falling down from above!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: WHATA-!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: WaaaaAah! What the hell is that!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And just like that, they're in a pinch!?

summary: Buggy's Business and the Climb to Zou: The Straw Hats reach the giant elephant Zou while the Revolutionary Army, Blackbeard Pirates, and Buggy's organization all react to the fall of Doflamingo.
